name: Enigma
description: Chaos hunts the spark of endless suns, whose light will die in my crushing grasp.

abilities.name: Event Horizon
abilities.description: The higher Enigma's level, the greater the applied movement speed slow.

abilities.name: Malefice
abilities.description: Focus his will on an enemy unit, damaging it and repeatedly stuns it. Strange gravities pull at the core of those who would oppose you, holding them in place.

abilities.name: Demonic Summoning
abilities.description: Summons fragments of the Enigma himself. Grants the summoned Eidolons max health bonus corresponding to Enigma's current health.

abilities.name: Midnight Pulse
abilities.description: Steeps an area in dark resonance, damaging enemy units based on their current health.

abilities.name: Black Hole
abilities.description: The ground trembles as Enigma channels his ultimate vortex of destruction, a singularity with the power to end worlds.
